expectations.text: Grounds the advice in the project plan: cites specific, accurate details from clearcontract_project_plan.md (phases, schema, architecture decisions, or the Out of Scope list)
expectations.evidence: Cites snapshot, quote_events IP/user-agent metadata, accepted_total server locking, T&C settings, Phases 4-5, and the card-deposit path as acceptance evidence.

expectations.text: Notices that quote e-signatures are explicitly listed in the plan's Out of Scope list (section 9)
expectations.evidence: "it's already parked in your Out of Scope list, sensibly."

expectations.text: Presents at least two genuine alternatives to the user's proposal (a defended 'defer / do nothing' counts as one)
expectations.evidence: Launch with the plain button vs typed-name/T&C/receipt hardening vs full drawn-signature e-signing — three distinct postures, each weighed.

expectations.text: Commits to a single clear recommendation rather than a neutral pros/cons list
expectations.evidence: "Short answer: no, don't add drawn-signature e-signing before launch" plus a concrete three-item alternative bundle.

expectations.text: Weighs build cost concretely for a solo part-time developer (time estimates or specific complexity costs like new collections/hooks)
expectations.evidence: "roughly a day of work folded into Phases 4-5: one form field, one checkbox, a small schema addition."

notes: Very strong baseline; substantively near-identical to the with-skill run. No git/build-state check, no decision-recording offer.
